chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Cr. Bail App. No. S – 905 of 2023 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge For hearing of bail application 1. For orders on office objection at Flag-A 2. For hearing of bail application 26.01.2024 Applicant is present in person. Mr. Rehmat Ali alias Raza Ali Shaikh, Advocate for complainant. Mr. Aftab Ahmed Shar, Additional Prosecutor General..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Muhammad Iqbal Kalhoro, J. – On account of some previous dispute, applicant along with other co-accused stormed into the house of complainant and caused injuries to brother of complainant, namely Ghulam Mustafa on different parts of his body on 08.10.2023 at about 08:00 a.m. Applicant is assigned one injury on nose of the victim, opined as 337-A(iii) PPC, whereas the remaining hurts, 05 in number, have been declared as other hurts, bailable. 2. Applicant’s Counsel is absent, but I have heard applicant in person and learned Counsel for complainant as well as learned Additional Prosecutor General for the State. 3. Complainant’s Counsel has opposed bail to the accused, but learned Additional Prosecutor General states that there is an inordinate delay in registration of FIR, and all other accused have been granted bail. Applicant has shown remorse and has in fact sought pardon from the complainant, who is also present in the Court. Further, I agree with the learned Additional Prosecutor General that there is a delay of more than one month in registration of FIR; hence, case of further enquiry is made out, and false implication of the applicant cannot be ruled out. 4. Accordingly, this application is allowed, and ad-interim pre- arrest bail already granted to applicant vide order dated 15.12.2023 is hereby confirmed on the same terms and conditions. 5.

Further, I agree with the learned Additional Prosecutor General that there is a delay of more than one month in registration of FIR; hence, case of further enquiry is made out, and false implication of the applicant cannot be ruled out. 4. Accordingly, this application is allowed, and ad-interim pre- arrest bail already granted to applicant vide order dated 15.12.2023 is hereby confirmed on the same terms and conditions. 5. The observations, as above, are tentative in nature and not meant to affect merits of the case before the trial Court. The bail application stands disposed of in the above terms. J U D G E Abdul Basit
